evals.prompt: I just cloned a Java project at /Users/dloffre/proj/claudit/sample-uaa and want to start exploring it before a security audit. What symbols and functions does it contain? Give me an overview.
evals.expected_output: Claude uses claudit index (create + list-symbols) to index the project and list its symbols, rather than manually grepping source files.

evals.prompt: Where is ScimGroupProvisioning defined in /Users/dloffre/proj/claudit/sample-uaa? Show me the source.
evals.expected_output: Claude uses claudit index lookup to find the definition, then claudit index get-body or reads the source at the right location.

evals.prompt: What does createScimGroup call in /Users/dloffre/proj/claudit/sample-uaa? I want to understand the call relationships.
evals.expected_output: Claude builds the call graph and uses claudit graph callees createScimGroup to show what it calls.

evals.prompt: What calls the save method in /Users/dloffre/proj/claudit/sample-uaa? I need to find all the entry points that persist data.
evals.expected_output: Claude uses claudit graph callers save to find callers, without passing --language to callers subcommand.

evals.prompt: I'm doing a security audit of /Users/dloffre/proj/claudit/sample-uaa. Can user input from the REST layer reach the database save operations? Trace the execution path.
evals.expected_output: Claude uses claudit path find with appropriate source and target functions, and handles 0-path result gracefully using the graph callees/callers fallback workflow.

evals.prompt: Is the getByName method reachable from createGroup in /Users/dloffre/proj/claudit/sample-uaa?
evals.expected_output: Claude uses claudit path find, and if 0 paths are found (due to Java interface/impl edge gap), falls back to graph callees/callers and reads source to verify manually.

evals.prompt: I found a call chain in /Users/dloffre/proj/claudit/sample-uaa: createScimGroup calls validateGroup which calls save. Highlight those three functions in the source.
evals.expected_output: Claude uses claudit highlight path createScimGroup validateGroup save --project-dir ... to produce color-annotated output.

evals.prompt: Show me the highlighted source for the createUser function in /Users/dloffre/proj/claudit/sample-uaa.
evals.expected_output: Claude uses claudit highlight function createUser --project-dir ... to produce highlighted HTML output.

evals.prompt: I want to fuzz the input validation in /Users/dloffre/proj/claudit/sample-uaa. Create a standalone test harness for the ScimGroup creation logic so I can test it in isolation.
evals.expected_output: Claude follows the harness iterative workflow: creates skeleton project, extracts functions with claudit harness extract, attempts compilation, stubs or extracts dependencies.

evals.prompt: Extract the createScimGroup function from /Users/dloffre/proj/claudit/sample-uaa and make it standalone for security testing. I need to understand all its dependencies.
evals.expected_output: Claude uses claudit harness extract with --functions createScimGroup, then claudit harness analyze-deps to identify dependencies, then iterates on compilation.
